introOverride: Principal-level architect and engineering lead with six years designing and shipping research-grade AI and security systems at national-security scale. I work at the architecture layer — platform patterns, integration contracts, evaluation frameworks — and prove the design by building it: LLM categorization architectures classifying 40M+ domains quarterly, Graph Neural Network pipelines, Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers unifying STIX/TAXII / MITRE ATT&CK / federal CISA AIS feeds, and AI model-security scanning on Temporal durable workflows with OSCAL-native compliance evidence. Published researcher (University of Arizona cybersecurity lab) pursuing an M.S. in Cyber & Information Operations. Seeking DARPA-adjacent work that rewards architecture-first thinking, rapid prototyping, and systems integration across ML and security.
whyCompany: Jataware's mix of DARPA-funded ML research, rapid prototyping, and a combined engineer / white-hat culture maps directly to my work at NetSTAR, Marriott, and Nagra today: research-grade systems shipped as production infrastructure, on short cycles, against real adversarial data. Projects like illicit smuggling detection and mobile application reverse engineering sit at the intersection of my current threat-intelligence and ML engineering practice.
headerSubtitle: Principal Engineer & Architect — AI & Threat Intelligence
